user.title: Choose authentication method
user.description: Family Hub images require Samsung account identity. Home Assistant SmartThings OAuth reuse may fail with 'No samsung id available'. Use Samsung client bearer token mode for the image endpoint, or legacy PAT if it still works for you.

menu_options.samsung_client_bearer: Samsung client bearer token for Family Hub image endpoint

oauth.title: Reuse SmartThings OAuth credentials
oauth.description: Select an existing HA core SmartThings integration to borrow its OAuth2 credentials. Tokens refresh automatically, but this token may not work for Family Hub images if Samsung account ID is unavailable.

samsung_client_bearer.title: Samsung client bearer token
samsung_client_bearer.description: Enter a Samsung/SmartThings mobile-client bearer token, Device ID, and CID for the Family Hub image endpoint. The token may be pasted raw or prefixed with Bearer.

pat.title: SmartThings Personal Access Token
pat.description: Tokens created after 2024-12-30 expire every 24 hours. You will need to reauthenticate after each expiry.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SmartThings
reauth_confirm.description: Your SmartThings token has expired. Please enter a new token from https://account.smartthings.com/tokens

reauth_samsung_client_bearer.title: Update Samsung client bearer token
reauth_samsung_client_bearer.description: Update the Samsung client bearer token, Device ID, and CID used for Family Hub image downloads.

error.samsung_id_unavailable: This token does not include the Samsung account ID required by the Family Hub image endpoint. Switch to Samsung client bearer token mode or legacy PAT mode.
